sentences.english: Hello, I'm calling about the marketing assistant position posted on your website.
sentences.korean: 안녕하세요. 웹사이트에 올라온 마케팅 어시스턴트 직무에 대해 전화했어요.

sentences.english: Yes that position is still open.
sentences.korean: 네 그 직무 아직 열려 있어요.

sentences.english: I'd like to know more about the job requirements.
sentences.korean: 직무 요건에 대해 더 알고 싶어요.

sentences.english: We're looking for someone with at least one year of experience in digital marketing.
sentences.korean: 디지털 마케팅에서 최소 1년 경력이 있는 분을 찾고 있어요.

sentences.english: I have about two years of experience.
Please send your resume and cover letter to hr@company.com and we'll review it within a week.
sentences.korean: 이력서와 자기소개서를 hr@company.com으로 보내주시면 일주일 내에 검토하겠습니다.
